The children were moved in the first weeks of the conflict when the hospital where they were being cared for was besieged by the Israeli military. The return to their families has been marked

news.headline: Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in attacks on Iran
news.summary: Spain's airspace is now closed to U.S. planes involved in attacks on Iran, a step beyond its previous denial of use of jointly-operated military bases. Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez has become one of the most vocal critics of the US and Israeli attacks in Iran, describing them as reckless and illegal
